---
id: get-using-get-7
title: "Application detail"
description: "Requires <b>applications.overview</b> authority for authenticated user"
sidebar_label: "Application detail"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Application detail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications/{uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.overview</b> authority for authenticated user

If you need to find out current information about particular *application* - primarily its state 
and other details - use `/financing/v1/applications/{applicationId}` resource where `{applicationId}` 
is the application ID you received in the response of `/financing/v1/applications` after its creation

| Financing type | Supported            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| `INSTALLMENT`         | YES  |

If the request was successfully processed, you receive HTTP status code 200 and application object with at least following information in the response:

- Application unique ID
- Application type
- Application state
- Application substate
- Gateway redirect URL

> You may also receive information about current **down payment** which is useful when 
you need to find out whether customer's loan was approved with different down payment 
than had been initially set in your embedded installment calculator.

In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 404         | APPLICATION_NOT_FOUND  | The requested resource could not be found |
| 422         | NOT_SUPPORTED | Resource is not supported for given financing type |
| 422         | UNPROCESSABLE | The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors |
| 500         | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}

Only `PERMANENT` and `CONTACT` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer"},"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name"},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name"},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number with country code (including leading `+`)"},"tin":{"type":"string","description":"tax identification number (ICO)"}},"title":"FinancingV1CustomerBase"},"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Redirect user to this URL if state is PROCESSING and stateReason is PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA or PROCESSING_VERIFICATION or PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED."},"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"order":{"type":"object","required":["items","number","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of delivery"},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"delivery tracking number"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Tracking number for the item. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"FinancingV1FinancingSettings"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Application state.","enum":["CANCELLED","PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED"]},"stateReason":{"type":"string","description":"Describes internal state of application, e.g. when state is PROCESSING - reason why application remains in processing state","enum":["CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED","CANCELLED_TO_RETURN","PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_NEW","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_SIGNED","PROCESSING_VALIDATION_IN_PROGRESS","PROCESSING_VERIFICATION","READY_DELIVERED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_PAID","READY_SHIPPED","READY_TO_SHIP","REJECTED"]},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Financing type","enum":["CONSUMER_LOAN","GOODS_FINANCING","INSTALLMENT","OPERATING_LEASE"]}},"title":"FinancingV1Application"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
